posts.text:
A transcript is rich input—not final truth. Teams get burned feeding raw transcripts into content systems. Clean your source before asking tools to build on it.

Episode 14: Building a reliable podcast production pipeline with Maya Chen.

Perfect recording + chaotic process, or decent recording + bulletproof pipeline?

Listeners notice sloppy metadata—even when the conversation is great. Production discipline is part of the product.

Episode 14: Building a reliable podcast production pipeline.
